Safe-zone guides stay out of exported PNGs. Fit mode protects poster text; Fill mode gives full-bleed artwork. Export JSON for admin Player CRM upload.

TitaniumGraphite metal and carbon detailing frame the avatar without dimming it.
DiffractedCyan, magenta, lime and gold appear only where the virtual light catches.
PNGExport renders from the engine canvas for clean offline output at up to 4×.
